reviews.review_msg: Andrey is knowledgeble and really cares about his students, if you like Real Estate, this course you can learn a lot!

Very easy class, Andrey marks completely subjectively and it is impossible to do badly. He doesn't teach and relies on students to "present," or lecture, to the class each week on that weeks material. Tests are on excel and are a time crunch.

One of the few profs that structures their course so it's more practical and less academic. I.e., exams mainly test understanding of concepts rather than memorization. Lectures were mostly talking about current events. Big downside is that the exams were so easy that everyone scored well, making it difficult to get a good grade.
Completely useless prof and waste of money. Teaches nothing during class and is also impossible to reach outside of class. The entire class is spent on talking about current events

He was extremely unclear about his instructions. Take any other finance course except BUS 419 with him - absolute nightmare. Super confusing questions, very little instruction and no care for students. MAKE SURE TO AVOID AT ALL COSTS!!!
Loved His Market Risk Class.

3hr class now a 45 min "Q&A" session where he answers your questions. does 0 teaching, expects you to watch videos and other things on your own bc he "doesnt really care for his opinion". From the get go he assumes you know how to interpret futures/options on cme group with NO prior knowledge. If I knew how to do all this id be on wall street
Unclear, Worst Professor

Extremely clear with what he expects you to learn and tells you exactly what will be on the exams. The course material isn't too difficult and important concepts are covered multiple times. Goes on rants and likes to discuss finance news in class. Definitely recommend!

wow, such a great teacher. Knowledgeable and amazing personality. I wish SFU has hired more of people like him rather than Jan Simon. He knows every branch of finance in depth and more importantly he knows how to transfer his knowledge. Of course you need to know a bit of mathematics, otherwise you be like those who rate him low here.

He is very knowledgeable. The course is tough and if students don't have statistic background it is even more challenging. However he really make it simple and he explain stuff very well. It was a business course and there were many international student without knowing anything about Mathematics, for those it was really tough. He is A++++++
very nice prof!!
Well, Avoid him if you can.  Just goes through the motion - absolutely no value added by his lectures.  I think he realizes it too.  Thats why his exams are ridiculously simple.
Unclear and unprepare.  Change his minds all the times.  Don't take his course if you have low tolerance for ambiguity!

Agree with below about the tricky Q's in exams. When he says u just need to know his lecture notes for the exams - he's LYING. u have to read the textbook. And make sure u do all the chapter exercises - sometimes he uses the exact same text Q's in his exams. ~Lazy and tricky prof.
I don't think's easy. Very unclear and unprepared. Make up questions on exams that you have no clue what it is asking about.
Very lazy and unclear professor. I do not why SFU still let him teach! Avoid him if you like risk management.
Who said he is easy? I don't think so. He will ask you to prove math formulas in midterm...so not easy. Maybe he read the earlier comments.
easy
He cannot teach. But if you want an easy time. go with him. if you want to learn sth, stay away from him.
Easy calculations...still got tricked by him in the exam with the proves
No Comments
easy easy easy
great prof.
He likes to throw in some jokes once in a while.
If you're weak in math, take Pavlov for 312. Nice guy, can't teach
No Comments
May be a good teacher, but not for an intro finance class.
giving A's out like candies
Looked like Jim Carey, and you can't find anyone easier than this guy.
Way too easy...sometimes it's a bad thing
Does he understand the bell curve??
No Comments
The best teacher I've had in Business
No Comments
nice guy, but not a very good teacher
No Comments

Make you look forward to going to his class
